title: Why is AI expensive all of a sudden?
summary: Video explores why AI has become expensive, covering token pricing economics and the trend of "tokenmaxxing" where developers optimize code to consume more tokens. Discusses the real underlying reasons for rising AI costs with reference to industry analysis.
writeup: This Alberta Tech video examines why AI costs have risen, focusing on token pricing economics and a trend the video calls "tokenmaxxing," in which developers optimize code to consume more tokens. It draws on industry analysis to identify the underlying reasons behind rising AI expenses and touches on local inference as part of the discussion. The takeaway is a breakdown of how token consumption and pricing structures drive cost, rather than cost being a sudden or arbitrary shift.
